messages.content: cherche les 15 derniers tickets que j'ai créés
SELECT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t WHERE t.creator_id = 5 AND t.type != 'Group' ORDER BY t.create_time DESC LIMIT 15
cherche les tickets créés par mwu ou dba
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u ON u.id = t.creator_id WHERE (u.username = 'mwu' OR u.username = 'dba') AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les tickets créés par mwu ou dba pour le projet Comant2026

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u ON u.id = t.creator_id JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE (u.username = 'mwu' OR u.username = 'dba') AND p.code = 'Comant2026' AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les tickets du projet Comant2026
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.code = 'Comant2026' AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les tickets de l'utilisateur dfg
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u ON u.id = t.assignee_id WHERE u.username = 'dfg' AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les 20 derniers tickets que j'ai consultés
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = t.id WHERE l.user_id = 5 AND l.action LIKE '%view%' ORDER BY l.datetime DESC LIMIT 20
cherche les tickets que j'ai créés pour le projet MultiView

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.code = 'MultiView' AND t.creator_id = 5 AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les tickets que mwu a créés
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u ON u.id = t.creator_id WHERE u.username = 'mwu' AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les tickets de type Bug
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t WHERE t.type = 'Bug' AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les tickets de type Aide
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t WHERE t.type = 'Aide' AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les tickets qui ont un nom qui commence par "test"
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t WHERE t.summary LIKE 'test%' AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les 10 derniers tickets que j'ai consultés
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = t.id WHERE l.user_id = 5 AND t.type != 'Group' AND l.action = 'VIEW-TICKET' ORDER BY l.datetime DESC LIMIT 10
cherche les tickets de priorité moyenne
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t WHERE t.priority = 2 AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les tickets de priorité moyenne
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t WHERE t.priority = 2 AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les tickets de type documentation
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t WHERE t.type = 'Documentation' AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les tickets que j'ai créés pour le projet Comant2026

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.code = 'Comant2026' AND t.creator_id = 5 AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les tickets que j'ai créés pour le projet Comant2026

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.code = 'Comant2026' AND t.creator_id = 5 AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les tickets du dernier projet que j'ai consulté

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary 
FROM ticket t 
JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id
JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id
JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = p.id
WHERE l.user_id = 5 AND l.action = 'VIEW-PROJECT';
cherche les tickets du dernier projet que j'ai consulté

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = p.id WHERE l.user_id = 5 AND l.action = 'VIEW-PROJECT' AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les 10 derniers tickets que j'ai consultés
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM log l JOIN ticket t ON t.id = l.ressource_id WHERE l.user_id = 5 AND l.action = 'VIEW-TICKET' AND t.type != 'Group' ORDER BY l.datetime DESC LIMIT 10
cherche les tickets du projet MultiView
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.code = 'MultiView' AND t.type != 'Group'
Les tickets du projet SLS2025
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.code = 'SLS2025' AND t.type != 'Group'
Les tickets associés au composant ihm:web_apps
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN component c ON c.id = t.component_id WHERE c.name LIKE '%ihm:web_apps%' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets assignés à mwu
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u ON u.id = t.assignee_id WHERE u.username = 'mwu' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets assignés à mwu qui sont ouverts
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u ON u.id = t.assignee_id WHERE u.username = 'mwu' AND t.status = 'Ouvert' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets qui ont le status Fonctionne pour moi
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.close_status FROM ticket t WHERE t.close_status = 'Fonctionne pour moi' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets qui ont un status en attente d'une compilation
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t WHERE t.validation_status = 'En attente d\'une compilation' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets qui ont un status en pause
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t WHERE t.status = 'En pause' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets qui sont estimés
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t WHERE t.status = 'Estimé' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets qui sont ouverts
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t WHERE t.status = 'Ouvert' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets de dba qui sont fermés
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u ON u.id = t.assignee_id WHERE u.username = 'dba' AND t.status = 'Fermé' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets créés par mwu qui sont assignés à sls

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u1 ON u1.id = t.creator_id JOIN user u2 ON u2.id = t.assignee_id WHERE u1.username = 'mwu' AND u2.username = 'sls' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets créés par mwu qui sont assignés à sls et qui sont en attente d'une compilation

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u1 ON u1.id = t.creator_id JOIN user u2 ON u2.id = t.assignee_id WHERE u1.username = 'mwu' AND u2.username = 'sls' AND t.validation_status = 'En attente d\'une compilation' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets créés par mwu qui sont assignés à sls et qui sont prêts à être vérifiés

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u1 ON u1.id = t.creator_id JOIN user u2 ON u2.id = t.assignee_id WHERE u1.username = 'mwu' AND u2.username = 'sls' AND t.validation_status = 'Prêt à être vérifié' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets ouverts de projets avec une priorité haute

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t
JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id
JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id
WHERE p.priority = 3 AND t.status = 'Ouvert' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets ouverts de projets avec une priorité basse

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.priority = 1 AND t.status = 'Ouvert' AND t.type != 'Group'
les 10 derniers tickets que j'ai consultés

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary
FROM ticket t
JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = t.id
WHERE l.user_id = 5 AND l.action = 'VIEW-TICKET' AND t.type != 'Group'
ORDER BY l.datetime DESC
LIMIT 10
les 10 derniers tickets que j'ai créés
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t WHERE t.creator_id = 5 AND t.type != 'Group' ORDER BY t.create_time DESC LIMIT 10
les 10 derniers tickets que j'ai consultés
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = t.id WHERE l.user_id = 5 AND l.action = 'VIEW-TICKET' AND t.type != 'Group' ORDER BY l.datetime DESC LIMIT 10
cherche les tickets associés au client Airbus
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN ticket_client tc ON tc.ticket_id = t.id JOIN client cl ON cl.id = tc.client_id WHERE cl.name LIKE '%Airbus%' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets de projets de type Documentation
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.type = 'Documentation' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets de type action de projets de type Documentation

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.type = 'Documentation' AND t.type = 'Action' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets du premier projet que j'ai consulté aujourd'hui

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary
FROM ticket t
JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id
JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id
WHERE p.id = (
    SELECT l.ressource_id
    FROM log l
    WHERE l.user_id = 5
    AND l.action = 'VIEW-PROJECT'
    AND DATE(l.datetime) = CURDATE()
    ORDER BY l.datetime ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
AND t.type != 'Group'
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC;
les tickets de projets qui ont la branche de release Rios49
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.branch_release = 'Rios49' AND t.type != 'Group';
cherche les tickets créés par mwu, assignés à sls pour le projet Comant2026

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u1 ON u1.id = t.creator_id JOIN user u2 ON u2.id = t.assignee_id JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE u1.username = 'mwu' AND u2.username = 'sls' AND p.code = 'Comant2026' AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les tickets créés par mwu, assignés à sls

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN user u1 ON u1.id = t.creator_id JOIN user u2 ON u2.id = t.assignee_id WHERE u1.username = 'mwu' AND u2.username = 'sls' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets qui ont été fermés hier

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = t.id WHERE l.action = 'UPDATE' AND l.class LIKE '%Ticket%' AND DATE(l.datetime) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND JSON_EXTRACT(l.log_data, '$.changes.status[1]') = 'Fermé' AND t.type != 'Group';
les tickets qui ont été fermés en avril 2026

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = t.id WHERE l.action = 'UPDATE' AND l.class LIKE '%Ticket%' AND DATE(l.datetime) BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-04-30' AND t.type != 'Group' AND JSON_EXTRACT(l.log_data, '$.changes.status[1]') = 'Fermé';
les tickets qui ont été estimés aujourd'hui

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = t.id WHERE l.action = 'UPDATE' AND DATE(l.datetime) = CURDATE() AND JSON_EXTRACT(l.log_data, '$.changes.status[1]') = 'Estimé' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets qui ont été fermés en avril 2026

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = t.id WHERE l.action = 'UPDATE' AND l.class LIKE '%Ticket%' AND DATE(l.datetime) BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-04-30' AND t.type != 'Group' AND JSON_EXTRACT(l.log_data, '$.changes.status[1]') = 'Fermé';
cherche les tickets du projet Comant2026
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.code = 'Comant2026' AND t.type != 'Group'
cherches les tickets qui ont été fermés en mars 2026 en lien au projet SLS2025

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = t.id WHERE p.code = 'SLS2025' AND l.class LIKE '%Ticket%' AND l.action = 'UPDATE' AND JSON_EXTRACT(l.log_data, '$.changes.status[1]') = 'Fermé' AND l.datetime >= '2026-03-01' AND l.datetime < '2026-04-01' AND t.type != 'Group';
cherches les tickets qui ont été fermés en mars 2026 en lien au projet SLS2025

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = t.id WHERE p.code = 'SLS2025' AND l.class LIKE '%Ticket%' AND l.action = 'UPDATE' AND JSON_EXTRACT(l.log_data, '$.changes.status[1]') = 'Fermé' AND l.datetime >= '2026-03-01' AND l.datetime < '2026-04-01' AND t.type != 'Group';
cherche les tickets qui ont le mot insa dans la description
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t WHERE t.description LIKE '%insa%' AND t.type != 'Group'
donne-moi les tickets qui sont associés à deux ou plus projets

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary
FROM ticket t
JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id
WHERE t.type != 'Group'
GROUP BY t.id, t.code, t.summary
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT pt.project_id) >= 2
tickets associés à la branche release Rios49
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.branch_release = 'Rios49' AND t.type != 'Group'
tickets associés à la branche release Rios49
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.branch_release = 'Rios49' AND t.type != 'Group'
tickets associés à la branch dev tools
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.branch_dev = 'tools' AND t.type != 'Group'
tickets associés à la branch dev tools
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.branch_dev = 'tools' AND t.type != 'Group'
tickets associés à la branch dev DVarStatCt
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.branch_dev = 'DVarStatCt' AND t.type != 'Group'
tickets associés à la branche developpement tools
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.branch_dev = 'tools' AND t.type != 'Group'
tickets associés à la branch developpement DVarStatCt
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.branch_dev = 'DVarStatCt' AND t.type != 'Group'
cherche les tickets associés à la branch dev tools
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE p.branch_dev = 'tools' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets qui appartiennent à la branche de travail PChlorine

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE FIND_IN_SET('PChlorine', REPLACE(p.branches, ' ', '')) > 0 AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets qui appartiennent à la branche de travail PChlorine

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE FIND_IN_SET('PChlorine', REPLACE(p.branches, ' ', '')) > 0 AND t.type != 'Group'
le dernier ticket que j'ai consulté la semanie dernière

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = t.id WHERE l.user_id = 5 AND l.action = 'VIEW-TICKET' AND l.datetime >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND t.type != 'Group' ORDER BY l.datetime DESC LIMIT 1
Les tickets qui ont été estimés ou fermés la semaine dernière

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN log l ON l.ressource_id = t.id WHERE (l.action = 'UPDATE' AND JSON_EXTRACT(l.log_data, '$.changes.status[1]') IN ('Estimé', 'Fermé')) AND l.datetime >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND t.type != 'Group';
les tickets où j'ai laissé un commentaire
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN comment c ON c.ticket_id = t.id WHERE c.user_id = 5 AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets qui ont un commentaire de mwu
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN comment c ON c.ticket_id = t.id JOIN user u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE u.username = 'mwu' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets qui ont le mot cinematique dans la description
SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t WHERE t.description LIKE '%cinematique%' AND t.type != 'Group'
les tickets associés à la branche DComant

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE t.type != 'Group' AND (FIND_IN_SET('DComant', REPLACE(p.branches, ' ', '')) > 0 OR p.branch_release = 'DComant' OR p.branch_dev = 'DComant')
les tickets associés à la branche DComant

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.code, t.summary FROM ticket t JOIN project_ticket pt ON pt.ticket_id = t.id JOIN project p ON p.id = pt.project_id WHERE (FIND_IN_SET('DComant', REPLACE(p.branches, ' ', '')) > 0 OR p.branch_release = 'DComant' OR p.branch_dev = 'DComant') AND t.type != 'Group'
